MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-12-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem A.M. Young, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Jill Aquino, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff 201 Turk Street L.P.
Jak Steven Marquez appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Ammar Kaid is present.
Tiffany Wong representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was not filed.

This case settled, the trial date of March 17, 2008 is vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-06-2008 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. JAK MARQUEZ OF BECKMAN, MARQUEZ & DOWLING, TEL. NO. 495-8500 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT AMMAR KAID'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, 5 DAYS TO ANSWER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Maura Baldocchi, CSR# 5207 =301/PJB/LB
